Question: What are the primary business challenges driving the Intelligent Solution Builder initiative?
Guidance: Describe the top 3–5 pain points (e.g. manual effort, inconsistent quality, low throughput)
Notes: Core drivers shape solution scope and prioritisation

Question: How many active pre-sales engagements does Amatra currently manage per quarter?
Guidance: Baseline metric to measure throughput improvement; current target is ~8 per quarter
Notes: Throughput baseline for success measurement

Question: What are the measurable success criteria for this platform?
Guidance: e.g. turnaround time ≤2 days, ≥24 engagements/quarter, 40% hour reduction, 99.9% uptime, ≥90% first-review QA pass rate
Notes: Drives acceptance testing and KPI dashboards

Question: How will first-review QA pass rate be measured and by whom?
Guidance: Define review process, reviewer roles, and scoring methodology
Notes: Needed to instrument quality feedback loop

Question: Who are the primary day-to-day users of the platform and what are their technical skill levels?
Guidance: Pre-sales consultants, delivery consultants, sales team — include headcount and AWS familiarity
Notes: Drives UX complexity and training scope

Question: Who has authority to approve go/no-go for each build phase?
Guidance: Name roles and approval thresholds for budget and scope changes
Notes: Governance and escalation path

Question: Is the Phase 1 MVP deadline of 2026-09-30 fixed or flex?
Guidance: Identify hard vs. aspirational deadlines and any linked business events
Notes: Hard deadline tied to flagship client renewal in Jan 2027

Question: What is the criticality of the 2027-01-31 client renewal deadline?
Guidance: Describe the revenue or contractual risk if the platform is not live before that date
Notes: Single biggest external forcing function for the programme

Question: Is the $300K–$450K build budget inclusive of AWS infrastructure, licensing, and professional services?
Guidance: Clarify CapEx vs. OpEx split and any ring-fenced contingency reserve
Notes: Right-sizes scope and determines feasibility of phased delivery

Question: What approval process governs budget changes above a defined threshold?
Guidance: Identify threshold amount, approvers, and lead time required
Notes: Risk management and change control process

Question: What consulting hours per engagement are currently spent on artifact creation?
Guidance: Estimate hours by role (solutions architect, consultant, reviewer) to quantify the 40% reduction target
Notes: Baseline for ROI calculation and cost justification

Question: What is the current state of the legacy internal monolith running on the single EC2 instance?
Guidance: Include OS, runtime, application stack, data it holds, and planned retirement date
Notes: Migration risk and retirement sequencing

Question: Which artifact types and templates currently exist in Google Workspace?
Guidance: List all document types (discovery questionnaire, SOW, solution briefing, design doc, Terraform, etc.) and their formats
Notes: Scope of template migration into the new pipeline

Question: Is us-west-2 the only required AWS region, or are multi-region or DR regions needed?
Guidance: Confirm primary region and any secondary/DR region requirements
Notes: Architectural scope and data residency compliance

Question: What existing AWS accounts and AWS Organizations structure does Amatra have today?
Guidance: Number of accounts, OU structure, Control Tower usage, existing SCPs
Notes: Landing zone and account strategy for new platform

Question: Are there existing AWS programmes (MAP credits, EDP, APN) that apply to this project?
Guidance: Identify any committed spend agreements or credit pools available
Notes: Cost planning and procurement strategy

Question: What is the expected maximum duration of a single artifact-generation job?
Guidance: Confirm the 30–60 min range; identify p95 and worst-case durations
Notes: Lambda timeout limits (15 min max) may require Step Functions or ECS

Question: Should long-running generation jobs use AWS Step Functions, ECS/Fargate, or another pattern?
Guidance: Evaluate against Lambda 15-minute limit; async polling vs. WebSocket push-back to client
Notes: Architectural decision with cost and complexity implications

Question: Which Amazon Bedrock Claude model(s) are targeted (e.g. Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Haiku)?
Guidance: Specify model IDs and whether on-demand or provisioned throughput is required
Notes: Model selection drives cost, latency, and quality

Question: What is the expected number of Bedrock API calls (tokens in/out) per engagement?
Guidance: Estimate input and output token volumes per artifact type and per engagement
Notes: Primary cost driver; needed for pricing model

Question: Are there prompt templates or system prompts already defined, or will these be developed from scratch?
Guidance: Include existing examples or style guides for generated artifacts
Notes: Development scope and quality baseline

Question: What is the expected volume of client briefs and generated artifacts stored per month?
Guidance: Estimate file count, average sizes, and total monthly S3 storage growth
Notes: S3 storage tier selection and lifecycle policy design

Question: What is the retention policy for generated artifacts and client data?
Guidance: e.g. 7 years for SOW, 90 days for drafts — include any regulatory drivers
Notes: S3 lifecycle rules, DynamoDB TTL, and compliance obligations

Question: What clients or systems will call the REST API (API Gateway)?
Guidance: Internal web app, CLI, CRM integration (Salesforce?), or external partners
Notes: API design, throttling, and auth scope

Question: Does the platform need to integrate with Salesforce CRM or any proposal management tool?
Guidance: Describe any opportunity-to-artifact workflow or data sync requirements
Notes: Integration complexity and Phase 2 scope

Question: What response-time SLA is required for synchronous API endpoints (e.g. brief submission)?
Guidance: e.g. <2 s for submission acknowledgment; async poll/callback for generation completion
Notes: API Gateway and Lambda cold-start tuning

Question: What is the expected peak concurrent user count and peak concurrent generation jobs?
Guidance: Provide average and peak (e.g. end-of-quarter proposal rush)
Notes: Lambda concurrency limits and DynamoDB capacity planning

Question: What is the Okta-to-Cognito migration plan — bulk import, phased cut-over, or parallel run?
Guidance: Identify user population size, attribute mapping needs, and federation requirements
Notes: Scopes identity migration effort and risk

Question: Will Cognito federate with Okta via SAML/OIDC during a transition period?
Guidance: Determine if Okta remains IdP with Cognito as SP, or full migration
Notes: Identity architecture decision affecting security and UX

Question: How are per-user and global monthly usage limits defined and enforced?
Guidance: Describe limit types (API calls, tokens, jobs), reset cadence, and admin override process
Notes: DynamoDB usage tracking schema and Lambda enforcement logic

Question: What IaC tooling is currently used and what is the target Terraform version?
Guidance: Include any existing CI/CD pipelines (CodePipeline, GitHub Actions, GitLab) and state backend preferences
Notes: Phase 2 Terraform automation scope and toolchain alignment

Question: Has Amatra's SOC 2 Type II scope been defined — does the new platform fall within scope?
Guidance: Confirm whether the Intelligent Solution Builder is in-scope for the existing or new SOC 2 audit
Notes: Security controls, audit logging, and penetration testing requirements

Question: What GDPR obligations apply to client data stored in this platform?
Guidance: Identify data subjects, processing purposes, and any EU/UK data subject data that may be in client briefs
Notes: Data handling policies, DPA agreements, and right-to-erasure workflows

Question: How should generated artifacts and client brief content be classified?
Guidance: e.g. Confidential, Restricted — include classification schema in use
Notes: Encryption tier selection and access control granularity

Question: Is United States data residency sufficient, or are specific AWS regions required per client contract?
Guidance: Confirm us-west-2 meets all contractual and regulatory obligations
Notes: Region lock-in and any future multi-region requirements

Question: What MFA policy is required for platform users?
Guidance: e.g. TOTP, hardware key, Cognito built-in MFA — include admin vs. standard user differentiation
Notes: Cognito MFA configuration and user pool policy

Question: What encryption requirements apply to data at rest in S3 and DynamoDB?
Guidance: SSE-S3, SSE-KMS (AWS-managed vs. CMK), and key rotation cadence
Notes: KMS CMK management adds operational overhead and cost

Question: What TLS version and cipher requirements apply to API Gateway and all service endpoints?
Guidance: Minimum TLS version (1.2 or 1.3) and any approved cipher suites
Notes: API Gateway security policy configuration

Question: What IAM strategy governs Lambda execution roles and cross-service permissions?
Guidance: Least-privilege roles per function, permission boundaries, or AWS Organizations SCPs
Notes: Security posture and blast-radius containment

Question: What audit logging requirements must be met (CloudTrail, CloudWatch Logs, S3 access logs)?
Guidance: Log retention periods, immutability (WORM), SIEM integration requirements
Notes: Compliance evidence for SOC 2 and incident response

Question: What is the patch and vulnerability management cadence for Lambda runtimes and container images?
Guidance: e.g. monthly patching SLA, Inspector integration, dependency scanning in CI/CD
Notes: Ongoing security hygiene obligations

Question: Are there network-level controls required — VPC deployment, PrivateLink, WAF on API Gateway?
Guidance: Describe egress/ingress policies, IP allowlisting, and DDoS mitigation needs
Notes: Architecture decision; VPC adds cost and complexity for serverless

Question: What is the Recovery Time Objective (RTO) for the platform?
Guidance: Maximum acceptable downtime — e.g. <1 hour, <4 hours, <24 hours
Notes: Determines multi-AZ vs. multi-region active-active architecture

Question: What is the Recovery Point Objective (RPO) for artifact and usage data?
Guidance: Maximum acceptable data loss — e.g. zero, <15 minutes, <1 hour
Notes: DynamoDB backup strategy: point-in-time recovery vs. on-demand snapshots

Question: What monitoring and alerting platform is in use today (CloudWatch, Datadog, PagerDuty, etc.)?
Guidance: Identify existing tooling and any contractual commitments to avoid duplication
Notes: Integration scope for operational dashboards and on-call alerting

Question: What metrics and alarms are critical for the platform (error rates, LLM latency, cost anomalies)?
Guidance: List top 5–10 KPIs for the operations team
Notes: CloudWatch dashboard and alarm design

Question: What support model is required — business-hours (8x5), extended (24x5), or 24x7?
Guidance: Identify SLA tiers for P1/P2/P3 incidents
Notes: Support staffing, on-call rotation, and AWS Support plan tier

Question: How should the platform scale to handle a 3× increase in concurrent engagements?
Guidance: Confirm Lambda reserved concurrency targets and DynamoDB auto-scaling thresholds
Notes: Capacity headroom and cost scaling model

Question: What AWS cost governance controls are required (budgets, alerts, tagging policy)?
Guidance: Describe tag taxonomy, budget alert thresholds, and cost centre allocation
Notes: FinOps hygiene and showback/chargeback requirements

Question: What maintenance windows are available for deployments and patching?
Guidance: Days/times when brief service interruptions are acceptable
Notes: CI/CD pipeline scheduling and blue/green deployment design

Question: What operational run-book and training documentation is required for the platform team?
Guidance: Identify audience (internal DevOps, external MSP) and format requirements
Notes: Knowledge transfer scope and go-live readiness criteria

Question: Is this a greenfield build or does any legacy EC2 monolith functionality need to be migrated?
Guidance: Confirm scope of monolith retirement and any data migration required before platform launch
Notes: Sequencing of legacy retirement vs. new platform go-live

Question: How will existing Word/Excel/PowerPoint artifact templates be ingested into the automated pipeline?
Guidance: Describe template count, format, and any required fidelity checks
Notes: Template migration is on the critical path for Phase 1

Question: What is the prioritised list of artifact types for Phase 1 MVP?
Guidance: e.g. discovery questionnaire, solution briefing, SOW first; design doc and Terraform in Phase 2
Notes: Scope boundary between Phase 1 and Phase 2

Question: What functionality must be deferred to Phase 2 (2026-12-15) or GA (Q1 2027)?
Guidance: Identify must-have vs. nice-to-have features for each phase boundary
Notes: MVP scope control to meet the 2026-09-30 deadline

Question: What internal engineering resources (FTEs) will Amatra dedicate to this project?
Guidance: Roles, seniority levels, and % time commitment for the VP of Engineering's team
Notes: Project plan feasibility and staffing gap analysis

Question: Will Amatra use an external implementation partner, AWS ProServe, or build fully in-house?
Guidance: Describe procurement approach and any preferred vendors already shortlisted
Notes: Build vs. buy vs. partner decision and commercial structure

Question: What is the QA and acceptance testing strategy for generated artifacts?
Guidance: Describe who reviews outputs, acceptance criteria, and any automated quality scoring
Notes: Drives the internal QA feedback loop (target ≥90% first-review pass rate)

Question: What environments are required (dev, staging, prod) and how are they isolated?
Guidance: Separate AWS accounts, VPCs, or environment-level isolation approach
Notes: Environment strategy and CI/CD pipeline design

Question: How will pre-sales consultants be onboarded and trained on the new platform?
Guidance: Number of users, training format (live, self-serve), and change champions
Notes: Adoption risk and training plan scope

Question: What go-live readiness criteria must be met before each phase launch?
Guidance: e.g. security sign-off, UAT completion, runbook approval, on-call rotation in place
Notes: Gate criteria for Phase 1, Phase 2, and GA launches

Question: What are the top 3 risks that could cause the Phase 1 deadline (2026-09-30) to slip?
Guidance: Consider LLM quality, identity migration, template conversion, staffing, or vendor delays
Notes: Risk register seed — mitigation strategies to be defined in SOW

Question: Are there third-party dependencies (Okta contracts, AWS Bedrock model availability, procurement lead times) that could block the programme?
Guidance: List external dependencies and their owners
Notes: Critical path and contingency planning

Question: What technical or organisational constraints must the solution work within?
Guidance: e.g. existing AWS account structure, Okta contract end date, security review lead times, change freeze periods
Notes: Solution design boundaries and scheduling constraints

Question: What assumptions is Amatra making that require validation before the project begins?
Guidance: e.g. Bedrock model quality meets artifact standards, existing templates are machine-readable, Cognito supports all Okta attributes
Notes: Assumption log — unvalidated assumptions become project risks
